actionConfiguration.body:
WITH flipped AS (
	UPDATE upper_article_session
	SET is_latest = FALSE
	WHERE id = NULLIF('{{this.params.parentSessionId}}', '')::int
	RETURNING id
)
INSERT INTO upper_article_session
  (article_id, revision_no, status, parent_session_id, model_number, season, colorway, is_latest)
SELECT
  '{{this.params.articleId}}',
  COALESCE(
		(SELECT MAX(revision_no) + 1 FROM upper_article_session WHERE article_id = '{{this.params.articleId}}'),
		1
	),
  'DRAFT',
  NULLIF('{{this.params.parentSessionId}}', '')::int,
  NULLIF('{{this.params.modelNumber}}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{this.params.season}}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{this.params.colorway}}', 'null'),
  TRUE
RETURNING id, article_id, revision_no, status, parent_session_id, model_number, colorway;
